mapper.insert: INSERT INTO manager_score_change ( treasure_name, treasure_desc, manager_id, manager_name, post, branch_name, score, trigger_time, status, remark, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{treasureName}, #{treasureDesc}, #{managerId}, #{managerName}, #{post}, #{branchName}, #{score}, #{triggerTime}, #{status}, #{remark}, 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT manager_name, branch_name FROM manager_score_maintain WHERE manager_id = #{managerId} AND is_deleted=0
